remarks: Experience a "new home" feel with high-end finishes and a clean, minimalist aesthetic:  Freshly Renovated: Brand new flooring, sleek countertops, and modern cabinetry throughout.  Crisp Interior: Professional fresh paint provides a bright, inviting atmosphere.  Fully Equipped: Includes a refrigerator, electric stove, and a dedicated AC unit to keep you cool.  Efficient Living: Reliable electric heating in a layout designed for easy maintenance.  Building & Amenities Enjoy the perks of a building designed for effortless living:  On-Site Laundry: Clean and convenient laundry facilities right in the building-no more trips to the laundromat.  Dual Parking Options: Includes access to a covered parking area for weather protection and a spacious rear parking lot.  The Location: Everything at Your Fingertips Located in the heart of Norwalk, you are minutes away from the best the area has to offer:  Commuter's Dream: Instant access to Route 15 (Merritt Parkway) and I-95, making your commute as smooth as possible.  Shop & Dine: Close proximity to local shopping centers, grocery stores, and popular Norwalk dining spots.
